scripts.check:docs: node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const paths=['README.md','docs/setup.md','docs/mvp-manual-smoke-test.md'];const missing=paths.filter((p)=>!fs.existsSync(p));if(missing.length){console.error('Missing docs files:');for(const file of missing) console.error(file);process.exit(1);}"
scripts.build: npm run -w @llm-translator/core build && npm run -w @llm-translator/browser-extension build && npm run -w @llm-translator/obsidian-plugin build
scripts.test: npm run -w @llm-translator/core build && npm run -w @llm-translator/core test && npm run -w @llm-translator/browser-extension build && npm run -w @llm-translator/browser-extension test && npm run -w @llm-translator/obsidian-plugin build && npm run -w @llm-translator/obsidian-plugin test
